overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Warhammer 40,000: Space Marine 2 showing a power-armored Space Marine battling Tyranid aliens in a dark, foggy alien swamp. The player engages in visceral melee combat with a chainsword before transitioning to ranged combat while wading through murky water.

scene_state.functional_zone: alien swamp combat arena with bio-mechanical hive structure

events.description: player successfully parries an enemy attack, creating a blue energy glow effect
player executes a heavy chainsword attack, dismembering an alien creature

agents.ego_description: engaging multiple Tyranid Hormagaunts in close-quarters melee combat using a chainsword, performing parries and heavy attacks

notable_agents.action: Tyranid Hormagaunt leaping at the player with scything talons extended
Tyranid creature flanking from the right side, preparing to attack

entered.detail: large spiky organic structure with ribbed exoskeleton dominating the background
murky shallow water covering the ground with ripples from movement
jagged rock formation covered in alien moss and biomass

segments.scene_description: The player character stands in a shallow alien swamp dominated by a massive bio-mechanical hive structure in the background. Multiple Tyranid creatures attack from various angles, and the player parries their attacks before striking back with a chainsword, creating heavy blood splatter effects in the murky water.

scene_state.functional_zone: alien swamp channel with tall spire formations

events.description: character transitions from combat stance to movement, wading through deeper swamp water
moving into area with distinctive tall alien spires visible in the distance

agents.ego_description: moving through waist-deep swamp water away from the combat zone, surveying the alien landscape

entered.detail: tall thin organic spires rising from the swamp mist
glowing blue alien plants floating in the water

segments.scene_description: After clearing the immediate threats, the player moves through the waist-deep swamp water, leaving the hive structure behind on the left. The environment opens up to reveal tall alien spires in the misty distance, with bioluminescent flora glowing in the water. The atmosphere is tense but momentarily quiet.

scene_state.functional_zone: open swamp clearing with incoming enemy wave

events.description: player switches to ranged weapon and fires at a distant approaching enemy
enemy explodes from bolter fire, creating a shower of blood and gore
player switches back to melee as multiple enemies close the distance

agents.ego_description: engaging enemies at range with a bolter before switching to melee combat as the aliens close in, utilizing both ranged and close-quarters attacks

notable_agents.action: Tyranid creature sprinting through the water toward the player
alien warrior flanking from the left, preparing to leap

segments.scene_description: The player advances into a new clearing and engages a fresh wave of Tyranids, opening fire with a ranged weapon before the aliens close in. As enemies explode from gunfire, more creatures rush through the water from multiple directions, forcing the player to switch back to melee combat. The tall spires shift to the left as the player advances.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a murky alien swamp that shifts from a chaotic melee battle beneath a massive hive structure to a tense advance toward distant spires. It begins with the player character parrying and striking Tyranid creatures with a chainsword, sending heavy blood splatter across the shallow water in the shadow of a bio-mechanical hive. As the immediate threats are cleared, the camera follows the player wading through waist-deep water, leaving the hive behind as the environment opens up to reveal glowing bioluminescent flora and misty alien spires in the distance. The scene then shifts into a new clearing where the player opens fire on a fresh wave of enemies, causing creatures to explode from ranged gunfire. Finally, as more aliens rush through the water from multiple directions, the player switches back to melee combat while the tall spires drift to the left of the frame.
